F

FAST - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode
Hooks are called approximately every 16ms (~60fps).
find(String) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a button by its title, searching recursively through sub-menus.
find(String, boolean) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a button by its title, optionally searching recursively through sub-menus.
findById(int) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a button by its ID, searching recursively.
findById(int) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Provides searching of ContentView objects in this Container
findById(int) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Searches for a container by its numeric ID.
findById(int, boolean) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a button by its ID, optionally searching recursively.
findByTextId(String) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a button by its text ID, searching recursively.
findByTextId(String) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Searches for a ContentView by its text ID.
findByTextId(String) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Searches for a container by its text ID.
findByTextId(String, boolean) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a button by its text ID, optionally searching recursively.
findMenu(String) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a menu button by its title, searching recursively.
findMenu(String, boolean) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a menu button by its title, optionally searching recursively.
findMenuById(int) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a menu button by its ID, searching recursively.
findMenuById(int, boolean) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a menu button by its ID, optionally searching recursively.
findMenuByTextId(String) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a menu button by its text ID, searching recursively.
findMenuByTextId(String, boolean) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Finds a menu button by its text ID, optionally searching recursively.
FLEXIBLE - Enum constant in enum class microui.RendererConfig.Mode
Flexible rendering mode (default).
FULL - Enum constant in enum class microui.constants.AutoResizeMode
Largest text size - uses the full available space.
FullSingleLineTextController - Class in microui.core.controller
Comprehensive controller for managing single-line text input with advanced features.
FullSingleLineTextController() - Constructor for class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Constructs a FullSingleLineTextController with empty initial text.
FullSingleLineTextController(String) - Constructor for class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Constructs a FullSingleLineTextController with initial text.
FullSingleLineTextController.ValidationMode - Enum Class in microui.core.controller
Validation modes for text input.
